response.original_title: hololive 3rd Generation Live #OperationHeartfulCuties ~You've Got No Choice but to Love The Strongest Idols~ Day 1
response.overview: featuring VTubers Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine. Held at K-Arena Yokohama on January 17-18, 2026, it featured musical performances and was streamed on ABEMA.
response.title: hololive 3rd Generation Live #OperationHeartfulCuties ~You've Got No Choice but to Love The Strongest Idols~ Day 1
